<script>
// Function to check if the element is in the viewport
function isElementInViewport(el) {
    var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
  
    return (
        rect.top >= 0 &&
        rect.left >= 0 &&
        rect.bottom <= (window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight) &&
        rect.right <= (window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth)
    );
}

// Function to handle scroll events
function onScroll() {
    var formIds = ['mktoForm_4237', 'mktoForm_4425', 'mktoForm_4424', 'mktoForm_4426'];

    for (var i = 0; i < formIds.length; i++) {
        var form = document.getElementById(formIds[i]);
        if (form && isElementInViewport(form)) {
            console.log('Form with ID ' + formIds[i] + ' is visible');
            window.mutiny.client.trackConversion({ name: 'Form Visible' })
            
            window.removeEventListener('scroll', onScroll);
            break; // Stop checking once a form is visible
        }
    }
}

// Function to check if any form is present on the page
function isAnyFormPresent() {
    var formIds = ['mktoForm_4237', 'mktoForm_4425', 'mktoForm_4424', 'mktoForm_4426'];

    for (var i = 0; i < formIds.length; i++) {
        var form = document.getElementById(formIds[i]);
        if (form) {
            return true;
        }
    }

    return false;
}

// Initial check before attaching the scroll event listener
if (isAnyFormPresent()) {
    // Attach the onScroll function to the scroll event
    window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll);

    // Initial check in case any of the forms are already visible when the page loads
    onScroll();
} else {
    console.log('Mutiny - No forms found on the page.');
}
</script>

    // Define job boards

    var queryParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    var gh_jid = queryParams.get('gh_jid');
    var gh_src = queryParams.get('gh_src');

    // Flag to ensure only one redirect happens
    var redirected = false;

    // Check if job exists in the board (using XMLHttpRequest)
    function checkJobInBoard(jobId, board, callback) {
        var apiEndpoint = 'https://boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/' + board + '/jobs/' + jobId;
        var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhr.open('GET', apiEndpoint, true); // true for asynchronous

        xhr.onreadystatechange = function () {
            if (xhr.readyState === 4) { // Request is complete
                if (xhr.status >= 200 && xhr.status < 300) { // Success status codes
                    // Job found in this board
                    callback(board);
                } else {
                    console.error('Error checking job board:', xhr.statusText); // Optional: log errors for debugging
                }
            }
        };

        xhr.onerror = function () {
            console.error('Network error checking job board:', xhr.statusText); // Optional: log network errors
        };

        xhr.send();
    }

    // Function to iterate and check boards
    function processJobBoards(index) {
        if (redirected || index >= jobBoards.length) {
            return; // Stop if redirected or all boards checked
        }

        var board = jobBoards[index];

        checkJobInBoard(gh_jid, board, function (correctBoard) {
            if (!redirected) { // Only redirect if not already redirected
                redirected = true; // Set flag to prevent further redirects
                var redirectUrl = 'https://www.billtrust.com/careers/job-openings/careers-job-details-application?gh_jid=' + gh_jid + '&source=' + correctBoard + '&gh_src=' + gh_src;
                window.location.href = redirectUrl;
            }
        });

        // Continue to the next board after a short delay (optional, to avoid hammering the API)
        setTimeout(function() {
            processJobBoards(index + 1);
        }, 50); // Small delay
    }

    // Start processing from the first board
    if (gh_jid) { // Only run if gh_jid exists
        processJobBoards(0);
    } else {
        // If gh_jid is not found in the URL, redirect to the general careers page.
        // window.location.href = 'https://www.billtrust.com/careers/job-openings';
      console.log("gh_jid is not found in the URL");
    }

<script>
    setTimeout(function() {
        // 1. Extract gh_jid and gh_src from URL
        var ghSrc, ghJid;

        // Parse query parameters
        var queryString = window.location.search;
        if (queryString) {
            // Remove leading '?'
            var queryParams = queryString.substring(1).split('&');
            for (var i = 0; i < queryParams.length; i++) {
                var pair = queryParams[i].split('=');
                if (decodeURIComponent(pair[0]) === 'gh_src') {
                    ghSrc = decodeURIComponent(pair[1] || '');
                } else if (decodeURIComponent(pair[0]) === 'gh_jid') {
                    ghJid = decodeURIComponent(pair[1] || '');
                }
            }
        }

        // Parse fragment identifier (hash) parameters
        var hashString = window.location.hash;
        if (hashString) {
            // Remove leading '#'
            var hashParams = hashString.substring(1).split('&');
            for (var i = 0; i < hashParams.length; i++) {
                var pair = hashParams[i].split('=');
                if (decodeURIComponent(pair[0]) === 'gh_src' && !ghSrc) { // Only set if not already found in query
                    ghSrc = decodeURIComponent(pair[1] || '');
                } else if (decodeURIComponent(pair[0]) === 'gh_jid' && !ghJid) { // Only set if not already found in query
                    ghJid = decodeURIComponent(pair[1] || '');
                }
            }
        }
        
        // If neither gh_src nor gh_jid is present, exit
        if (!ghSrc && !ghJid) {
            return;
        }

        // 2. Helper function to update link href
        function updateLinkHref(link, ghSrcVal, ghJidVal) {
            var href = link.getAttribute('href');
            if (!href) return; // Skip if no href

            var newHref = href;

            // Add gh_src if present and not already in href
            if (ghSrcVal && newHref.indexOf('gh_src=') === -1) {
                newHref += (newHref.indexOf('?') > -1 ? '&' : '?') + 'gh_src=' + ghSrcVal;
            }

            // Add gh_jid if present and not already in href
            if (ghJidVal && newHref.indexOf('gh_jid=') === -1) {
                 newHref += (newHref.indexOf('?') > -1 ? '&' : '?') + 'gh_jid=' + ghJidVal;
            }

            link.setAttribute('href', newHref);
        }

        // 3. Update .breadcrumbs__list-item a links
        var breadcrumbLinks = document.querySelectorAll('#breadcrumbs a');
        for (var i = 0; i < breadcrumbLinks.length; i++) {
            updateLinkHref(breadcrumbLinks[i], ghSrc, ghJid);
        }

        // 4. Update .jobs-listing a links
        var jobListingLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.jobs-listing a');
        for (var i = 0; i < jobListingLinks.length; i++) {
            updateLinkHref(jobListingLinks[i], ghSrc, ghJid);
        }

    }, 500); // Delay execution by 500ms
</script>

<script>
// Campaign, Content, Date, Generic, Medium, Referrer, Source, Term cookies code 
function crumbleCookie(a) {
  for (var d = document.cookie.split(";"), c = {}, b = 0; b < d.length; b++) {
    var e = d[b].substring(0, d[b].indexOf("=")).trim(),
      i = d[b].substring(d[b].indexOf("=") + 1, d[b].length).trim();
    c[e] = i
  }
  if (a) return c[a] ? c[a] : null;
  return c
}

function bakeCookie(a, d, c, b, e, i) {
  var j = new Date;
  j.setTime(j.getTime());
  c && (c *= 864E5);
  j = new Date(j.getTime() + c);
  document.cookie = a + "=" + escape(d) + (c ? ";expires=" + j.toGMTString() : "") + (b ? ";path=" + b : "") + (e ? ";domain=" + e : "") + (i ? ";secure" : "")
}

function writeLogic(n) {
  var a = getTrafficSource(n, 'billtrust.com'); //Insert your domain here
  a = a.replace(/\|{2,}/g, "|");
  a = a.replace(/^\|/, "");
  a = unescape(a);
  bakeCookie(n, a, 182, "/", "", "") //Cookie expiration sets to 182 days
};

function getParam(s, q) {
  try {
    var match = s.match('[?&]' + q + '=([^&]+)');
    return match ? match[1] : '';
  } catch (e) {
    return '';
  }
}

function calculateTrafficSource() {
  var source = '',
    medium = '',
    campaign = '',
    term = '',
    content = '';
  var search_engines = [
    ['bing', 'q'],
    ['google', 'q'],
    ['yahoo', 'q'],
    ['baidu', 'q'],
    ['yandex', 'q'],
    ['ask', 'q']
  ]; //List of search engines
  var ref = document.referrer;
  ref = ref.substr(ref.indexOf('//') + 2);
  ref_domain = ref;
  ref_path = '/';
  ref_search = '';
  // Checks for campaign parameters
  var url_search = document.location.search;
  if (url_search.indexOf('utm_source') > -1) {
    source = getParam(url_search, 'utm_source');
    medium = getParam(url_search, 'utm_medium');
    campaign = getParam(url_search, 'utm_campaign');
    term = getParam(url_search, 'utm_term');
    content = getParam(url_search, 'utm_content');
  } else if (getParam(url_search, 'gclid')) {
    source = 'google';
    medium = 'cpc';
    campaign = '(not set)';
  } else if (ref) {
    // separate domain, path and query parameters
    if (ref.indexOf('/') > -1) {
      ref_domain = ref.substr(0, ref.indexOf('/'));
    }
    medium = 'referral';
    source = ref_domain;
    // Extract term for organic source
    for (var i = 0; i < search_engines.length; i++) {
      if (ref_domain.indexOf(search_engines[i][0]) > -1) {
        medium = 'organic';
        source = search_engines[i][0];
        term = getParam(ref_search, search_engines[i][1]) || '(not provided)';
        break;
      }
    }
  }
  return {
    'source': source,
    'medium': medium,
    'campaign': campaign,
    'term': term,
    'content': content
  };
}
// Campaign cookie code
function getTrafficSource(cookieName, hostname) {
  var trafficSources = calculateTrafficSource();
  var source = trafficSources.source.length === 0 ? 'direct' : trafficSources.source;
  var medium = trafficSources.medium.length === 0 ? 'none' : trafficSources.medium;
  var campaign = trafficSources.campaign.length === 0 ? 'none' : trafficSources.campaign;
  // exception
  if (medium === 'referral') {
    campaign = '';
  }
  var rightNow = new Date();
  var value = campaign;
  return value;
}
// Self-invoking function
(function() {
  var date = new Date();
  var fr_date = date.getUTCFullYear().toString() + ((date.getUTCMonth() < 9) ? '0' + (date.getUTCMonth() + 1).toString() : (date.getUTCMonth() + 1).toString()) + ((date.getUTCDate() < 10) ? '0' + date.getUTCDate().toString() : date.getUTCDate().toString());
  var session = crumbleCookie()['fs_campaign'];
  if (typeof session == 'undefined') // First time session
  {
    writeLogic('fs_campaign');
  } else {
    writeLogic('rs_campaign');
  }
})();

<script>
/**
 * Set the local time offset to display time values in the users local time
 */
function setTimeOffset() {
	// Create all the dates necessary
	var now = later = d1 = d2 = new Date(),
		set = { 'offset': now.getTimezoneOffset(), 'dst': 0 }
	// Set time for how long the cookie should be saved - 1 year
	later.setTime(now.getTime() + 365 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
	// Date one is set to January 1st of this year
	// Guaranteed not to be in DST for northern hemisphere and guaranteed to be in DST for southern hemisphere (If DST exists on client PC)
	d1.setDate(1);
	d1.setMonth(1);
	// Date two is set to July 1st of this year
	// Guaranteed to be in DST for northern hemisphere and guaranteed not to be in DST for southern hemisphere (If DST exists on client PC)
	d2.setDate(1);
	d2.setMonth(7);

	// DST exists for this time zone – check if it is currently active
	if ( parseInt( d1.getTimezoneOffset() ) != parseInt( d2.getTimezoneOffset() ) ) { 
		// Find out if we are on northern or southern hemisphere - Hemisphere is positive for northern, and negative for southern
		var hemisphere = parseInt( d1.getTimezoneOffset() ) - parseInt( d2.getTimezoneOffset() );

		if (
			( hemisphere > 0 && parseInt( d1.getTimezoneOffset() ) == parseInt( now.getTimezoneOffset() ) ) ||
			( hemisphere < 0 && parseInt( d2.getTimezoneOffset() ) == parseInt( now.getTimezoneOffset() ) ) 
		) {
			// DST is active right now
			set.dst = 1;
		}
	}
	document.cookie ='time_zone='+ JSON.stringify(set) +'; expires='+ later +'; path=/';
}

// Trigger the time offset cookie creation
setTimeOffset();
                            </script>

    (function() {
        if (typeof MktoForms2 === "undefined") {
            console.warn("[CaliberMind] MktoForms2 not yet available.");
            return;
        }

        MktoForms2.whenReady(function(form) {
            // Avoid duplicate bindings by checking a custom flag
            var formEl = form.getFormElem()[0];
            if (formEl.getAttribute("data-calibermind-identify-loaded") === "true") {
                return;
            }
            formEl.setAttribute("data-calibermind-identify-loaded", "true");

            form.onSubmit(function() {
                var values = form.vals();

                if (values.Email) {
                    if (typeof analytics === "undefined") {
                        console.warn("[CaliberMind] AnalyticsJS not loaded.");
                    } else {
                        analytics.identify(values.Email, {
                            email: values.Email,
                            firstName: values.FirstName,
                            lastName: values.LastName,
                            company: values.Company
                        });
                        console.log("[CaliberMind] identify call triggered for", values.Email);
                    }
                } else {
                    console.warn("[CaliberMind] Email not found in form values.");
                }
            });
        });
    })();
</script>

<script>
function qualifiedIdentifyEmail (d) {
  var d = d;
  var keys = Object.keys(d);
  for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
    var key = keys[i];
    var value = d[key];
    if (typeof value === "string" && /.+\@.+\..+/.test(value)) {
      return value;
    }
  }
};

qualified('handleEvents', function(name, data) {
  if (name !== 'Email Captured' || !data || (!data.field_values && !data.message)) {
    return;
  }
  else if (name === 'Email Captured' && data && data.field_values && qualifiedIdentifyEmail(data.field_values) !== null && qualifiedIdentifyEmail(data.field_values) !== undefined) {
    var eV = qualifiedIdentifyEmail(data.field_values);
    analytics.identify(eV, { email: eV });
  }
  else if (name === 'Email Captured' && data && data.message && qualifiedIdentifyEmail(data.message) !== null && qualifiedIdentifyEmail(data.message) !== undefined) {
    var eV = qualifiedIdentifyEmail(data.message);
    analytics.identify(eV, { email: eV });
  }
});
</script>

<script>
  var policyTextDiv = document.getElementById("onetrust-policy-text");
  if (policyTextDiv) {
    var updatePolicyLink = function() {
      var policyLink = policyTextDiv.querySelector(".ot-cookie-policy-link");
      if (policyLink) {
        policyLink.setAttribute("href", "https://www.billtrust.com/legal/cookie-policy");
        policyLink.setAttribute("target", "_blank");
        policyLink.setAttribute("rel", "noopener");
        policyLink.setAttribute("aria-label", "More information about our Cookie Policy, opens in a new tab");
      }
    };
    // Initial run
    updatePolicyLink();
    // Observe for changes
    var observer = new MutationObserver(updatePolicyLink);
    observer.observe(policyTextDiv, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  }
</script>
